name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100-$500), installment loans ($100-$1,000), and title loans ($2,000-$25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender operating physical store locations across the United States, including this Jacksonville, Florida branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. The company has built its brand around providing fast access to emergency cash for consumers between paychecks or facing immediate financial needs. With over 125,000 customer reviews averaging 4.9 stars, the company emphasizes accessibility and customer service as core differentiators in the emergency lending space.

Advance America offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ranging from $100-$500 with 2-4 week terms; Installment Loans from $100-$1,000 with longer repayment periods and multiple payment options; and Title Loans from $2,000-$25,000 where a vehicle serves as collateral. All products are available through in-store application, online application, or phone pre-qualification. The Jacksonville location maintains extended hours (10 AM-6 PM weekdays, 9 AM-6 PM Friday, 9 AM-4 PM Saturday) and Spanish-language customer service.

The company differentiates itself through same-day personal loan availability up to $1,000, a physical store network enabling in-person service, bilingual staff, and integration with Western Union services. Their installment loan product specifically addresses limitations of traditional payday loans by offering larger amounts and flexible repayment schedules. Customer testimonials highlight staff expertise in explaining loan options and the application process.

However, as a traditional alternative lender, Advance America operates in the high-cost lending space. The website provides no APR, fee, or total cost transparency—critical information for evaluating these products. Title loans require vehicle collateral and create repossession risk. Payday and installment loans are designed as short-term emergency solutions, not sustainable debt management tools. The company's reliance on storefront locations limits convenience compared to fully digital competitors, though online options partially address this.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Larger loan amounts with installment loans ($100-$1,000) compared to payday-only competitors
Physical store network with extended weekend hours (open Saturdays 9 AM-4 PM)
Bilingual customer service (English and Spanish) at all locations
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone pre-qualification
4.9-star rating based on 125,419 verified customer reviews
Title loans available up to $25,000 for vehicle owners with paid-off cars
Western Union services integrated at store locations
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—total cost of borrowing unclear
Title loans require vehicle collateral, creating repossession risk if payments missed
Short-term loan structure (2-4 weeks for payday loans) not designed for ongoing financial stability
Physical store requirement for in-person applications limits accessibility compared to fully online lenders
Target market (emergency cash borrowers) typically has limited alternatives and credit constraints
best_for: Consumers needing $100-$1,000 in immediate cash for emergency expenses between paychecks
Vehicle owners seeking short-term cash loans ($2,000-$25,000) using car title as collateral
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville seeking in-person financial service with bilingual support
Applicants unable or unwilling to wait for bank loans and needing same-day funding
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who have vehicle equity or stable paychecks and can repay within 2-4 weeks. The primary caveat is the absence of disclosed pricing—borrowers cannot evaluate true cost before applying, and these products typically carry triple-digit APRs, making them expensive compared to credit unions, personal loans, or employer advances under 36% APR.
services: Installment Loans ($100-$1,000 with multiple payment options)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
